texts:
PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cómo se ha desarrollado el programa de retribución flexible en los últimos meses considerando los avances de data hasta octubre de 2023?
   
2. ¿Existen recomendaciones actualizadas hasta octubre de 2023 sobre mejores prácticas o tendencias en la implementación de un sistema de retribución flexible?

3. Dado que los datos solo están disponibles hasta octubre de 2023, ¿qué cambios en la retribución flexible deberían anticiparse o reevaluarse antes de diciembre de 2023?
---
Flexible
Retribution
December 2023

PREGUNTAS:
1. How does the Flexible Remuneration system work to increase an employee's net salary, and what role do the Workers' Statute and the Personal Income Tax Law play in this process?

2. Can you detail how payments are structured within the Flexible Remuneration system and the tax implications for products and services acquired through it?

3. What specific benefits can an employee include in their Flexible Remuneration package to optimize their tax savings and consequently increase their net salary?
---
What is Flexible Remuneration?



A system that allows you to increase your salary thanks to the tax savings you obtain by contracting the products...

Flexible Remuneration is the formula by which a person can voluntarily receive part of their salary in benefits, increasing their net salary by reducing personal income tax.


Under the regulation of the Workers' Statute and the Personal Income Tax Law, products and services paid using this formula are exempt from personal income tax. In this way, payments are made from the gross salary of each person.



Text in blue shall be used for the explanation of the chart or the data source. 
For conclusions section, please use the text box on the left side.

PREGUNTAS:
1. How does the flexibility in choosing, modifying, and enjoying different benefit options positively impact my overall work-life balance?
   
2. Can you elaborate on the types of family care, learning, and leisure options available, and how they are tailored to enhance employee satisfaction?

3. What mechanisms are in place to ensure the voluntary participation in products and services offered collectively results in better pricing compared to individual procurement?
---
What’s in it for you? 
Higher net salary and a variety of options
Get higher net salary
We offer different options: learning, family care, leisure, transport
Your flexibility is the key: choose, modify and enjoy your choice 


Products and services with better price: collective vs individual
Voluntary participation: you decide 
We CARE!

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cuáles son los pasos específicos para acceder al sitio web de Edenred utilizando mi nombre de usuario y contraseña o clave de validación?
2. ¿Qué tipo de detalles sobre los planes puedo esperar encontrar al acceder al sistema por primera vez?
3. ¿A través de qué medios puedo comunicarme con el equipo de Recursos Humanos para resolver dudas sobre el sistema mencionado en la guía?
---
User’s Guide
Use this guide for an easy and quick access to the system


Access Edenred website directly with your username and password or validation key
Find plans’ details when you access the system for the first time
Got questions:
HR team

Chat in the system; Contact us

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cuáles son los pasos para modificar mis datos personales en la plataforma después de haber iniciado sesión por primera vez?
   
2. ¿Qué recomendaciones específicas se dan sobre el correo electrónico que debo usar al registrarme en la plataforma?

3. ¿Qué importancia tiene la firma del acuerdo de retribución flexible y cómo impacta en el uso de la plataforma?
---
Modify your Personal Data
The first time you enter the platform, fill in your personal data and other data not added
Mail: 
we recommend you signing up with your personal email address.
Password: remember carefully the password you assign to this account.


Important: 
Don't forget to sign the flexible retribution agreement!

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cuáles son los pasos específicos para utilizar el simulador de ahorro que se encuentra en el lado izquierdo de la pantalla con el fin de contratar una Tarjeta de Restaurantes, Tarjeta de Transporte y Guardería para el mes siguiente?

2. ¿Qué tipo de beneficios y detalles específicos sobre la remuneración puedo esperar encontrar en la sección "Mi Plan" en relación con la Tarjeta de Restaurantes, Tarjeta de Transporte y Guardería?

3. ¿Hasta qué fecha del mes tengo la opción de modificar mis elecciones de una Tarjeta de Restaurantes, Tarjeta de Transporte y Guardería, y cómo afecta esto mi esquema de remuneración en el siguiente mes?
---
Flexible Remuneration

Until the 15th of each month decide whether you want to contract Restaurant Card, Transportation Card and Nursery for the following month.
To see your savings check 
a simulator located on the left side of the screen 

Find your remuneration summary on the "Mi Plan" page 
In this section you can see all the benefits to which you have access

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cómo es el proceso exacto para realizar un pedido del producto de guardería mencionada en el fragmento, y qué detalles específicos se deben incluir en la sección "Mi Plan"?

2. ¿Cuál es el procedimiento de pago para el servicio de guardería, y qué información adicional se necesita proporcionar para que EDENRED realice las transferencias mensuales a nuestros contactos de guardería?

3. ¿Qué tipo de soluciones tecnológicas avanzadas están disponibles a través de la colaboración en el desarrollo de productos personalizados y entregas ágiles a gran escala mencionadas en el fragmento?
---
Product
Engineering
From custom platform and product development to scaled agile delivery, we join forces to build advanced technology solutions
Image library for your reference & usage - LINK  
Nursery
To order this product, add your request in the "Mi Plan" section.

"Guardería" - add contacts of your nursery, so we can pay for it. 

"Monthly payments" - add your nursery monthly fee. It will be transferred  by EDENRED each month.

PREGUNTAS:
1. How can I activate my Edenred card within the first 7 days of receiving it to ensure it's linked to my mobile phone correctly?
2. Is there a process outlined for editing the bar that reflects the main number on the slide, particularly concerning the regulation of the height of the blue element? 
3. How does the monthly recharge system work for the Edenred card, and is it possible to set up deposits for the entire year in advance?
---
Restaurant and Transport Card


Request the Edenred card in "Mi Plan" form to order this option

Edenred will allow linking your card with the mobile phone, you will need to activate it within the first 7 days since receiving it.


To edit the bar reflecting the main number on the slide, please regulate the height of the blue element 

Text in blue shall be used for the explanation of the chart or the data source. 
For conclusions, please use the text box on the left side. 
Monthly recharges - set the deposit for each month on your card. Click on “Save”. You can request for the whole year

Use the card in any restaurant, bar and delivery service whose payment gateway is registered with the restaurant code
